description: The macro-level pillar the term belongs to (e.g. context or data).
The conceptual grouping for organizing pilot tests and categorizing terms.
The exact search string or boolean cluster to be queried.
Terms to combine with a NOT operator to reduce noise relative to a given term.
The specific database field to apply the search term against.
The origin or justification for the search term for PRISMA-S documentation (e.g., team brainstorm or paper citation).
The date the term was added to the search strategy (ideally YYYY-MM-DD).
Indicates whether the term is currently being used in active queries or just being evaluated.
Additional context or rationale regarding the term or its exclusions.
